title: Kero Kero Keroppi no Yowamushi-ouji no Daibouken
titleRomaji: Kero Kero Keroppi no Yowamushi-ouji no Daibouken
titleNative: けろけろけろっぴのよわむし王子の大冒険
synonyms: Keroppi in the Adventures of the Coward Prince
synopsis: Keroppi is blamed for the tomfoolery of others during a movie. As he runs home crying he is struck by lightening and transported to another world--just like in the movie! There he meets a cowardly prince and the both of them go on adventure to learn about courage and sticking up for oneself.

title: Kero Kero Keroppi no Tomodachitte Ii na
titleRomaji: Kero Kero Keroppi no Tomodachitte Ii na
titleNative: けろけろけろっぴの友だちっていいな
synopsis: A new kid moves to town for a short stay with his father. He's really good at playing the ocarina but difficult to befriend. A bird likes to listen to his music and when a storm arrives they all help the bird by placing it and its nest into a bird house; this helps them all form an everlasting friendship as he moves once again.

synopsis: Wink is a lovely snake. He is Keroppi's friend. Keroppi wants to introduce Wink to his other friends. His friends deem Wink is a dangerous animal. Will they accept him finally?

title: Kero Kero Keroppi no Kyouryuu ga Deta
titleRomaji: Kero Kero Keroppi no Kyouryuu ga Deta
titleNative: けろけろけろっぴの恐竜がでた
synopsis: While playing hide and seek, Keroppi and the gang find some dinosaur bones. With the village elder they dig out more and put the bones back together and find out it was a baby dinosaur. In the nearby museum there is a mama dinosaur on display and as night falls the baby dinosaur's skeleton comes to life in search of its mother. The gang tries to help it reunite it and the cries of the baby dinosaur skeleton animate the mama's skeleton. Once together again their souls ascend to heaven and both skeletons become displayed lovingly at the museum.

title: Ikari no Daichi
titleRomaji: Ikari no Daichi
titleNative: 怒りの大地
synopsis: Japan’s food supply—the very sustenance of the Japanese people—is being crushed. The "American Train" is racing across the entire nation. Let’s revive Japanese agriculture and secure a safe and stable food supply right here on Japanese soil! (Source: NPO Science Film Museum, translated)

title: Kimetsu no Yaiba x MLB Tokyo Series presented by Guggenheim
titleRomaji: Kimetsu no Yaiba x MLB Tokyo Series presented by Guggenheim
titleNative: 鬼滅の刃 × MLB Tokyo Series presented by Guggenheim
synopsis: Major League Baseball enters the world of Demon Slayer for the Tokyo Series. As MLB celebrates games in Japan, baseball has partnered to release a Demon Slayer short film that depicts the evolution of Japanese baseball through the continuous passing of the torch across generations. (Source: MLB Official Facebook)

title: Honkai: Star Rail — Non-Zero-Sum Game
titleRomaji: Benghuai: Xingqiong Tiedao - Fei Ling He Boyi
titleNative: 崩坏：星穹铁道 非零和博弈
synonyms: 崩壊：スターレイル 非ゼロ和ゲーム
synopsis: "Your humble servant 'Aventurine,' at your service. Just a cog in the machine known as the IPC's Strategic Investment Department. Nevertheless, I can also play the role of "friend" — if needed." "Go ahead, use me as you wish, even stab me in the back when you see fit. But remember, I don't make deals that don't pay off... So, I hope you don't disappoint me." (Source: Honkai Star Rail Youtube Channel)

title: Tamaranai no wa Koi nano ka
titleRomaji: Tamaranai no wa Koi nano ka
titleNative: たまらないのは恋なのか
synonyms: Is It Because of Love That I Can't Resist?
synopsis: Misuzu was branded a delinquent when a small incident left him isolated. But one day, he sees the top student, Kitahara, get surrounded by bullies and decides to help him out. That sparked Kitahara's interest in the lonely boy, but Misuzu pushes Kitahara away. "If you get involved with me, you'll get ostracized by everyone else too." But it won't take long for Misuzu's resolve to falter... (Source: K Manga)

title: AS ONE
titleRomaji: AS ONE
titleNative: アズワン
synopsis: Square Enix’s sci-fi arcade game Starwing Paradox is making a comeback as a prequel anime movie. A new anime feature film titled AS ONE has been announced as a prequel story set 20 years before the events of the game, expanding the game’s universe with a new story. The movie is set to premiere in Summer 2025. (Source: Anime Corner)

tags.name: Full CGI
